judgments.raw_response:
{
  "archetype": "Open-source maintainer evaluating for adoption",
  "first_impression": "Finally, an agent framework that focuses on the configuration DX and local deployment instead of trying to reinvent the underlying runtime.",
  "biggest_strength": "The declarative YAML configuration coupled with the ability to mix frontier and local LLMs per-actor without writing Python.",
  "biggest_weakness": "It's ultimately a thin orchestration layer over CAMEL/OASIS, meaning upstream breaking changes or limitations will hit hard.",
  "would_star": true,

  "would_tell_network": true,
  "would_NOT_engage": false,
  "confidence_0_to_10": 9,
  "what_would_make_me_more_likely_to_engage": "Seeing a concrete plan for how versioning and schema migrations for the domain.yaml will be handled as the project matures."
}

{
  "archetype": "Indie hacker",
  "first_impression": "A fairly heavyweight opinionated bundle for multi‑agent simulations that promises a quick YAML‑first start but pulls in many moving parts.",
  "biggest_strength": "Provides a ready‑made, deterministic CLI architect and per‑actor LLM routing that lets you spin up domain‑specific simulations with minimal code.",
  "biggest_weakness": "Relies on multiple external services (Claude, Ollama Cloud, Docker‑compose DBs) and a stack of libraries, making the “copy‑paste quickstart” less frictionless than advertised.",
  "would_star": false,
  "would_share": false,
  "would_tell_network": false,
  "would_NOT_engage": true,
  "confidence_0_to_10": 6,
  "what_would_make_me_more_likely_to_engage": "A single‑binary, zero‑dependency version that runs locally with a default LLM and no Docker or external API requirements."
}

parsed_judgment.first_impression: A fairly heavyweight opinionated bundle for multi‑agent simulations that promises a quick YAML‑first start but pulls in many moving parts.
parsed_judgment.biggest_strength: Provides a ready‑made, deterministic CLI architect and per‑actor LLM routing that lets you spin up domain‑specific simulations with minimal code.
parsed_judgment.biggest_weakness: Relies on multiple external services (Claude, Ollama Cloud, Docker‑compose DBs) and a stack of libraries, making the “copy‑paste quickstart” less frictionless than advertised.
parsed_judgment.what_would_make_me_more_likely_to_engage: A single‑binary, zero‑dependency version that runs locally with a default LLM and no Docker or external API requirements.
